prompt: A photorealistic four-panel 2x2 grid layout presents a young adult European-appearance male with fair skin and light brown textured crop hair, styled naturally matte. His slim build is dressed in an oversized solid black matte cotton T-shirt, contrasted strikingly against a smooth bright orange seamless background with subtle tonal gradient. Studio lighting casts soft yet directional warm light, creating smooth cinematic shadows that accentuate his warm skin tones and defined facial features, including light stubble and medium fullness lips. Each panel varies in pose and gesture: top left shows his hand raised, fingers forming a circle framing one intense light green/hazel eye; top right captures a three-quarter relaxed, confident stance with black rectangular slim sunglasses fully worn; bottom left depicts a slight lean as he casually adjusts the sunglasses; bottom right faces forward with a direct gaze, hand reaching out blurred in shallow depth of field. Sharp focus centers on his face and eyes, with foreground hands artfully blurred where appropriate, evoking an urban, stylish influencer vibe with editorial streetwear flair. The composition emphasizes crisp textures—natural hair strands, cotton fabric weave, delicate metallic bracelet, and minimal black line tattoo on inner forearm—luminescent and ultra high resolution, with clean high-contrast color grading and no distractions, text, or artifacts.
